meaning: v.加熔(糖)使焦,(糖)熔化而变成焦糖
examples: Cook until the sugar starts to caramelize.
Now turn the heat to medium high so the sugar foams up and begin to caramelize .
The flavorful lamb juices saturate the mushrooms from within, while their craggy outsides crisp and caramelize.
Roast the nectarines at high heat until the flesh swells and the cut sides caramelize in spots.
The drippings, along with a pinch of sugar, will caramelize the cabbage as it transforms into something slick and smoky.
